validated_patterns.summary: When you sleep 7+ hours, your CRS averages 76. Under 6.5h, it drops to 64. That's a 13-point swing.
validated_patterns.nudge: Tonight's sleep drives tomorrow's score. Every hour counts.

validated_patterns.summary: Heavy exercise (60+ min) drops your next-day CRS. Happened 10 of 45 times.
validated_patterns.nudge: Hard workout today means lighter tomorrow. Plan accordingly.

emerging_patterns.summary: Fridays average CRS 76 — your strongest day of the week.
Sundays average CRS 66 — consistently your worst day. Least active, worst sleep the night before.
Nights with heavy after-hours email (>30%), next-day sleep quality tends to be lower.
